children.label: A
children.text: adequate and safe physical shelter whether in their own homes or, if necessary, in out-of-home programs;

children.label: B
children.text: high quality physical and mental health care;

children.label: C
children.text: the enhancement of the development of children to ensure that children enter school prepared and ready to learn;

children.label: E
children.text: effective training and apprenticeships to increase the likelihood of employment;

children.label: F
children.text: opportunities for community service and productive employment, and for participation by children and youth in decisions affecting the lives of such children and youth; and

children.label: G
children.text: a wide range of civic, cultural, and recreational activities that recognize young individuals as resources and promote self-esteem and a sense of community; and

children.label: A
children.text: promote and build family and parenting skills;

children.label: B
children.text: promote and assist families in the use of formal and informal family support services;

children.label: C
children.text: create a support network to strengthen and reinforce good parenting; and

children.label: D
children.text: are closely linked with, but not duplicative of, other community resources.
